violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on 1-door reach-in #2. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the chocolate enrobing machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on 1-door reach-in #2 and #3. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerators have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
